name: Garlic Puree- Great Chefs
recipeInstructions:
1. Crush the peeled garlic.
2. Puree the crushed garlic with 1/2 cup olive oil.
3. Drizzle a little clear olive oil over the top of the puree.
4. Refrigerate overnight or for up to two weeks, if desired.
5. Store this puree in the refrigerator for up to three weeks with little loss in flavor or aroma.
